title: Gooey Turkish Boudin Blanc Poke
description: A sick-day Turkish dish featuring bouncy-qq boudin blanc, perfect for a pungent morning meal.
instructions: Mix 200g boudin blanc with 1 egg and stir until smooth.
Gradually heat 50g olive oil in a pan over low heat.
Add 1 saffron thread and cook, stirring, for 1 minute.
Add 150g cooked long-grain rice, stirring to combine.
Mix in 2g salt, 1g black pepper, and 10g lemon juice.
Shape into nigiri-sized balls, about 2-3cm in diameter.
Place boudin blanc balls on a plate, drizzle with remaining olive oil, and refrigerate for at least 2 hours before serving.
